caption: The video captures a formal meeting of the House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs, dated April 12, 2019, focusing on S.23, a bill to increase the minimum wage. The setting appears to be an office or committee room with various items like a red tote bag featuring cartoon characters, a water bottle, and a tissue box visible in the background. A person with short gray hair is seated at a table, engaged in conversation with others who are partially visible. A camera operator stands nearby, capturing the proceedings. The atmosphere suggests a serious discussion, likely involving policy deliberations and strategic planning related to the proposed legislation.
